decisions.decision: Wave execution: each task writes independent .tex paragraph file, no file conflicts within wave
decisions.rationale: No worktree isolation conflicts, full parallel within wave

decisions.decision: Table data: user provides CSV, else placeholder
Full compile: manual (user runs make paper)

decisions.rationale: Structured Markdown output, cleaner for agent parsing
